name: viva-social-organizer-root
description: Root scripts for VivaTech Social Organizer (Flutter Web + Firebase Hosting + Functions).

scripts.build:flutter: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; flutter build web --release --pwa-strategy=none 2>&1 | tee /tmp/flutter-web-build.log && cp web/sw-killswitch.js build/web/flutter_service_worker.js'
